_comment: ElevenLabs voice_id per character. Cloned voices (Tony, Ji-lan, etc) get their voice_id after upload at elevenlabs.io/voice-lab. Library voices (Zoh-baggo, Jasmine, TK-Maxx) are picked from /v1/shared-voices.

Zoh-baggo.notes: User picked this voice. Confident/upbeat female Aussie. Sales-with-sass tone matches Zoh-baggo's business-casual goon personality.

TK-Maxx.voice_name: Jett - Professional Narrator (Deep warm baritone, light Australian tint)
TK-Maxx.notes: User picked Jett for TK-Maxx. Deep warm baritone with light Australian tint works for a tough goon.
